'''''Kauri''''' was an [[Agave-class picket ship|''Agave''-class picket ship]] assigned by the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] to assist in the capture of the [[Teljkon Vagabond]]. It was attacked and badly damaged.

{{Ship-stub}}

==Behind the scenes==
''Kauri'' was also the name of a server — or "Galaxy" — in ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'' which happens to be a mostly French server (during some parts of the day). Other times, it was a heavily central-time zone (USA) server.

==Appearances==
*''[[Before the Storm]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{C|in a holorecord}}
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{Mo}}

*<!-- 2008-12-09 -->''[[The Complete Star Wars Encyclopedia]]''
